prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital energies** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`. SCF converged after 6 cycles.
HOMO = -7.6155818 eV
LUMO = -0.17986527 eV
HOMO-LUMO Gap = 7.4357165 eV

The method used was Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`).
